req.title: Wire transfer (boundary variant)
req.statement: A customer shall initiate a wire transfer requiring two-factor authentication; transfers above $100,000 require manual review. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-031 defines three distinct decision zones: (1) transfers below $100,000 with valid 2FA — happy path, expect 200/wire queued; (2) transfers with stale 2FA — expect 401; (3) exact boundary at $100,000 — expect 202 + manual review flag; (4) exact boundary at $100,001 — also triggers manual review (above threshold). BVA demands we probe $99,999, $100,000, and $100,001. EP carves valid/invalid 2FA partitions. STC covers the 2FA state machine (fresh vs stale). NEG covers the 401 error path. DT covers the combined 2FA×amount matrix. I include five tests to satisfy minItems=3 with full heuristic coverage.

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_below_threshold_valid_2fa
preconditions: Customer account exists and is active
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
Transfer amount is within the standard partition (< $100,000)
actions: POST /transfers/wire with amount=50000.00 and a fresh 2FA token
expected: manual_review field is false or absent
trace: R-FIN-031: wire queued; compliance check started
R-FIN-031: transfers above $100,000 require manual review (complement: below does not)
tests.executable:
def test_wire_transfer_below_threshold_valid_2fa(api_client, fresh_2fa_token):
    payload = {
        "amount": 50000.00,
        "currency": "USD",
        "recipient_account": "<recipient_account_fixture>",
        "2fa_token": fresh_2fa_token,
    }
    response = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload)
    body = response.json()
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert body["transfer_status"] == "queued"
    assert body["compliance_check"] == "started"
    assert body.get("manual_review", False) is False

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_stale_2fa_returns_401
preconditions: Customer account exists and is active
actions: POST /transfers/wire with amount=50000.00 and a stale 2FA token
expected: Response body contains an error indicating 2FA is stale or expired
tests.executable:
def test_wire_transfer_stale_2fa_returns_401(api_client, stale_2fa_token):
    payload = {
        "amount": 50000.00,
        "currency": "USD",
        "recipient_account": "<recipient_account_fixture>",
        "2fa_token": stale_2fa_token,
    }
    response = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload)
    body = response.json()
    assert response.status_code == 401
    assert "2fa" in body.get("error", "").lower() or "authentication" in body.get("error", "").lower()

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_at_exact_threshold_100000_triggers_manual_review
preconditions: Customer account exists and is active
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
actions: POST /transfers/wire with amount=100000.00 and a fresh 2FA token
expected: Response body indicates wire is pending manual review
trace: R-FIN-031: transfers above $100,000 require manual review
tests.executable:
def test_wire_transfer_at_exact_threshold_100000_triggers_manual_review(api_client, fresh_2fa_token):
    payload = {
        "amount": 100000.00,
        "currency": "USD",
        "recipient_account": "<recipient_account_fixture>",
        "2fa_token": fresh_2fa_token,
    }
    response = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload)
    body = response.json()
    assert response.status_code == 202
    assert body.get("manual_review") is True
    assert body.get("transfer_status") in ("pending_review", "queued")

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_one_cent_below_threshold_no_manual_review
preconditions: Customer account exists and is active
2FA was verified within the last 5 minutes
Transfer amount is $99,999.99 (off-point just below boundary)
actions: POST /transfers/wire with amount=99999.99 and a fresh 2FA token
expected: manual_review field is false or absent
trace: R-FIN-031: transfers above $100,000 require manual review (complement boundary)
BVA off-point: $99,999.99 is one cent below the threshold
tests.executable:
def test_wire_transfer_one_cent_below_threshold_no_manual_review(api_client, fresh_2fa_token):
    payload = {
        "amount": 99999.99,
        "currency": "USD",
        "recipient_account": "<recipient_account_fixture>",
        "2fa_token": fresh_2fa_token,
    }
    response = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload)
    body = response.json()
    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert body["transfer_status"] == "queued"
    assert body.get("manual_review", False) is False

tests.name: test_wire_transfer_decision_matrix_stale_2fa_above_threshold
preconditions: Customer account exists and is active
Transfer amount is above $100,000 — both failure conditions active simultaneously
actions: POST /transfers/wire with amount=150000.00 and a stale 2FA token
expected: Authentication error takes precedence over manual-review logic
No wire is queued or flagged for review
trace: DT: row where 2FA=stale AND amount>100000 — 401 should dominate
tests.executable:
def test_wire_transfer_decision_matrix_stale_2fa_above_threshold(api_client, stale_2fa_token):
    payload = {
        "amount": 150000.00,
        "currency": "USD",
        "recipient_account": "<recipient_account_fixture>",
        "2fa_token": stale_2fa_token,
    }
    response = api_client.post("/transfers/wire", json=payload)
    body = response.json()
    assert response.status_code == 401
    assert body.get("transfer_status") not in ("queued", "pending_review")
